title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 700.097 - Registration not required, when
text:
700.097.  Registration not required, when. — No insurance company, finance company, bank, or trust company shall be required to register with the commission in order to sell any manufactured home or modular unit repossessed or purchased by the company on the basis of total destruction or theft thereof when the sale of the manufactured home or modular unit is in conformance with applicable title and registration laws of this state.
(L. 2008 S.B. 788)
